name: sre-crew-langgraph
description: BYO LangGraph SRE crew. A stateful multi-node graph (diagnose -> plan -> review -> apply -> summarize) that resolves a Kubernetes incident. LLM and tools both go through agentgateway; the Reviewer step pauses on a LangGraph interrupt() for human approval of the fix.

skills.name: Resolve a Kubernetes incident
skills.description: Diagnose a failing workload, plan the fix, and apply it after human approval.
